comment.description: A description of the YARA rule.

context.description: Context where the YARA rule can be applied

false-positive.description: Set to true if the related test sample is a false-positive hit for this YARA rule. If omitted, samples are treated as true-positive by default.

md5.description: MD5 hash of a file observed when testing the YARA rule (true positives or false positives).

reference.description: Reference or origin of the YARA rule.

sha1.description: SHA1 hash of a file observed when testing the YARA rule (true positives or false positives).

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of a file observed when testing the YARA rule (true positives or false positives).

sha512.description: SHA512 hash of a file observed when testing the YARA rule (true positives or false positives).

ssdeep.description: SSDEEP hash of a file observed when testing the YARA rule (true positives or false positives).

tlsh.description: TLSH hash of a file observed when testing the YARA rule (true positives or false positives).

version.description: Version of the YARA rule depending where the yara rule is known to work as expected.

description: An object describing a YARA rule (or a YARA rule name), its supported YARA version, and optional test-sample hashes. Test samples are true-positive by default; set false-positive=true when needed.
name: yara
